citation_and_locator: Lui, Pun Ho. 2025. Counterfactual Conditionals of Regret in Cantonese. Cahiers de Linguistique - Asie Orientale. DOI 10.1163/19606028-bja10055. Abstract; sections 3-5; author-uploaded CC BY 4.0 full-text page extraction.
what_it_supports: Directly defines Cantonese CCRs marked by `早知(道)`, expressing regret over a remedy that could have been undertaken in the past; argues grammaticalization from verb toward subordinator; reports shorter `早知` as more common; describes optional complement, subjects, and `就`, a required remedy VP in the prototype, noncanonical order, and restricted verbal properties of the marker.
limit: The direct PDF endpoint did not download reliably in this environment, so the full text was inspected through the author-uploaded page extraction. The article does not in the accessible text establish the exact project-corpus `咪仲好` subtype or a productive `咪` apodosis paradigm.

citation_and_locator: 鄭定歐, 張勵妍, 高石英. 2021. 香港粵語教程. Printed p. 231; regret communicative unit. Exact forms recorded in `docs/research/WECHAT-GX-TRAVEL-002-PRIORITY-GRAMMAR-RESEARCH-R1.md`.
what_it_supports: Independently presents `早知係咁就……` and `早知問下人就唔會蕩失路啦` as regret expressions, supporting ordinary `就` and `就唔會` consequents.
limit: Pedagogical attestation does not establish exhaustive syntax, frequency, unrestricted productivity, optionality, or the exact role of `咪`.

citation_and_locator: `test-data/natural-corpus-wechat-guangxi-travel-002-turns.json`, turn T08/B; `docs/research/WECHAT-GX-TRAVEL-002-PRIORITY-GRAMMAR-RESEARCH-R1.md`; exact `早知你坐佢架車咪仲好`.
what_it_supports: Supplies direct natural attestation for an evaluative `早知 … 咪仲好` surface in one coherent conversational context and confirms that the relevant `咪` is not transparently prohibitive there.
limit: One speaker/context cannot establish productivity, exact particle semantics, frequency, regional generality, or interchangeability with `就`; transcription confidence for the broader turn is medium.

limit: Mandarin evidence cannot establish Cantonese word order, optionality, particle selection, or semantics and contributes zero direct parser support.
